testcase.name: Using a mock object
testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: Using a utility function
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin Scenario: Using a utility function Given a utility function is available ... passed in 0.000s When I call the utility function ... passed in 0.000s Then it should return the correct output ... passed in 0.000s
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
